title: Dirtblock!
description: A mod with a *totaly* original take on skyblock! This time, you're set on an island made of nothing but 18 blocks of dirt. How will you progress and hopefuly escape your fate?
body:
Dirtblock is a grind-based, "original" twist on skyblock, where the island is nothing but dirt. It's based off of the original [Dirt Platform Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dirt-platform) by [HappyFish](https://www.curseforge.com/members/happyfish/projects). (Btw this mod was made in [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), ok, I'm sorry.)

![My Little Dirt Island :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c6c01e8e8965b937c7182ea89326b77c10af072.png)
